mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION ( BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, BATCH_RUN_NO, BASE_DATE, BATCH_TYPE, STATUS_CODE, TARGET_COUNT, PROCESSED_COUNT, ERROR_COUNT, STARTED_AT, FINISHED_AT, ERROR_MESSAGE ) VALUES ( #{batchExecutionId}, #{batchRunNo}, #{baseDate}, #{batchType}, #{statusCode}, #{targetCount}, #{processedCount}, #{errorCount}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION SET STATUS_CODE = #{statusCode}, TARGET_COUNT = #{targetCount}, PROCESSED_COUNT = #{processedCount}, ERROR_COUNT = #{errorCount}, FINISHED_AT = #{finishedAt}, ERROR_MESSAGE = #{errorMessage} WHERE BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = #{batchExecutionId}
mapper.select: SELECT BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, BATCH_RUN_NO, BASE_DATE, BATCH_TYPE, STATUS_CODE, TARGET_COUNT, PROCESSED_COUNT, ERROR_COUNT, STARTED_AT, FINISHED_AT, ERROR_MESSAGE FROM LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE #{baseDate} IS NULL OR BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} ORDER BY BATCH_EXECUTION_ID DESC

SELECT s.STEP_EXECUTION_ID, s.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, s.STEP_NAME, s.STATUS_CODE, s.STARTED_AT, s.FINISHED_AT, s.PROCESSED_COUNT, s.ERROR_MESSAGE FROM LOCF_BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION s, LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION b WHERE b.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = s.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID AND b.BATCH_RUN_NO = #{batchRunNo} ORDER BY s.STEP_EXECUTION_ID ASC
